host.description: Bare hostname or IP of the PostgreSQL server (no scheme, path, or credentials — a URL-shaped value is rejected).

port.description: TCP port, 1-65535. Defaults to 5432 when omitted.

sslmode.description: libpq sslmode. Defaults to disable when omitted.

schema.description: PostgreSQL schema to discover tables from. Defaults to public.

cursor_field.description: Optional column name used for incremental reads (rows with cursor_field greater than the stored cursor are read, ordered by cursor_field ascending).

read_limit.description: Maximum rows returned per Read snapshot SELECT. Defaults to 10000; set to 0, all, or unlimited to disable the bound.

mode.description: Set to fixture to short-circuit all network access and use canned catalog/rows (test/conformance harness use only; never set in production config).
